entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A crop grown in Odisha, India, whose productivity is negatively impacted by soil acidity and climate change phenomena.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: A major finger millet-growing state in India where the study was conducted.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research took place.

entities.name: GAJAPATI
entities.description: A district in Odisha where the on-farm study was carried out.

entities.name: KORAPUT
entities.description: A district in Odisha where the on-farm study was carried out.

entities.name: SOIL ACIDITY
entities.description: A soil condition characterized by low base saturation and toxic metals that reduces millet productivity.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A climate change-related phenomenon that negatively impacts finger millet yield.

entities.name: FLOODING
entities.description: A climate change-related phenomenon that negatively impacts finger millet yield.

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: A climate change-related phenomenon that negatively impacts finger millet yield.

entities.name: BUNDLED MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: A combination of improved variety, soil test-based fertilizer recommendation, and integrated pest management to enhance productivity.

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETY
entities.description: High-yielding cultivars used as a component of bundled management practices.

entities.name: SOIL TEST-BASED FERTILIZER RECOMMENDATION
entities.description: A method of applying fertilizers based on soil test results to optimize nutrient use, also referred to as STBF.

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A comprehensive approach to controlling pests used as a component of bundled management practices, also referred to as IPM.

entities.name: LOCAL VARIETY
entities.description: Traditional cultivars used as a control comparison in the study.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of finger millet grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: RAINWATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A measure of how effectively the crop utilizes rainwater, also referred to as RWUE.

entities.name: SYSTEM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall productivity of the agricultural system.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC NUTRIENT USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A measure of the efficiency of nutrient utilization by the crop, also referred to as ANUE.

entities.name: NET MONETARY RETURN
entities.description: The financial profit derived from the crop production, also referred to as NMR.

entities.name: BENEFIT COST RATIO
entities.description: An economic indicator of the profitability of the management practices.

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A soil element that positively correlates with finger millet yield.

entities.name: SULPHUR
entities.description: A soil nutrient that positively correlates with finger millet yield.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A soil nutrient that positively correlates with finger millet yield.

entities.name: BORON
entities.description: A soil nutrient that positively correlates with finger millet yield.
